Meaning.Vi: bị treo, bị đình chỉ, bị tạm ngưng
Meaning.En: Temporarily stopped, interrupted, or held in abeyance; not yet finalized or implemented.
Meaning.Example: The student was suspended from school for two weeks after breaking the rules.

Situation.Vi: Học sinh bị tạm cấm đến trường vì vi phạm nội quy.
Situation.En: A student is temporarily barred from attending school due to rule violations.

Situation.Vi: Dự án bị đình chỉ do thiếu vốn.
Situation.En: The project has been temporarily halted due to lack of funding.

Meaning.En: Hanging in the air or from a support, not resting on a surface.
Meaning.Example: The chandelier was suspended from the ceiling by thick iron chains.

Situation.Vi: Cây đèn được treo lơ lửng giữa phòng.
Situation.En: The lamp hangs suspended in the middle of the room.
